auth.name: Name

onboarding.title: Pick your handle
onboarding.subtitle: One more step to finish setting up your account.
onboarding.helper: Your home will live at /studio/{slug}. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens; it must be unique.
onboarding.failed: Could not set up your Studio. Please try again.

recovery.title: Save your recovery code
recovery.subtitle: This is the only way to reset your password if you cannot receive email. Save it somewhere safe — we cannot show it to you again.
recovery.ack: I have saved this recovery code in a safe place.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: We can email you a reset link, or you can use your recovery code.
forgot.sentSubtitle: If an account exists for that address, a reset link is on its way.
forgot.sentBody: We sent a reset link to {email}. If you don't see it within a few minutes, check spam or use the recovery code.
forgot.failed: Could not send the reset link. Please try again.

reset.subtitleToken: Pick a strong password — at least 8 characters.
reset.subtitleRecovery: Enter the recovery code you saved at sign-up and choose a new password.
reset.failed: Could not reset your password. Please try again.

verify.successBody: Your email is confirmed. You can now use everything breatic has to offer.
verify.failedBody: The link may have expired or already been used. Sign in and request a fresh verification email from your account settings.
verify.checkInboxBody: Open the verify-email link we just sent you. If it didn't arrive, you can request a new one from your account settings.

upgradeRequest.title: Request editor access

readonly.label: Read-only
readonly.description: This space is not open in the tab bar; read-only preview lets you pan/zoom and copy content, but not edit.

canvas.title: Read-only canvas
canvas.description: Real ReactFlow viewer plugs in once canvas-space is complete; here we show a read-only snapshot of nodes and edges, with zoom and copy.

document.title: Read-only document
document.description: TipTap read-only viewer plugs in when document-space ships; here we show a rich-text snapshot, with paragraph copy.

timeline.title: Read-only timeline
timeline.description: Timeline viewer plugs in when timeline-space ships; here we show a track snapshot, with clip copy.

recent.title: Recent
recent.subtitle: Projects and collections you recently edited or joined — across all your Studios, newest first.
recent.emptyHint: You haven't created or joined any project yet. Create your first project, or open a Studio to start — what you edit shows up here.
recent.loadError: Couldn’t load your recent projects. Try refreshing the page.

works.emptyHint: Works are the finished products a project publishes (a complete video, a mini-game…) — your Studio's public face. Once publishing ships, your published works will appear here.

nonMember.empty: This Studio has no published works.

switcher.guideRecent: Recent spans your latest work across Studios.
switcher.guideEnter: Pick a Studio to open its container.
switcher.guideTools: Tools live in the top-right corner.

projects.emptyHint: Projects are where you create on the infinite canvas. Create your first project to get started.

collections.title: Collections
collections.emptyHint: Collections are reusable sets of assets (images / video / audio) shared across projects. Once the backend ships, the collections you create will appear here.

credits.hint: Spends draw from expiring gift credits first, paid credits last.

members.cannotInvitePersonal: Personal studios can not invite members — it is just you.
members.inviteFailed: Could not invite this member. Please try again.
members.removeConfirmBody: {name} will lose access to every project in this studio, and any projects they own pass to you. This cannot be undone.
members.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.name: Name
settings.dangerHint: Transferring moves all projects, collections and the wallet to the new owner; deletion can not be undone. Owner only.
settings.transferBody: Choose a Maintainer to become the new Admin. They must accept before the transfer takes effect; you become a Maintainer.
settings.transferNoCandidates: No Maintainers to transfer to. Promote a member to Maintainer first.

rail.joinedEmpty: You haven't joined any Studio yet

invite.loadingBody: One moment while we load the invite.
invite.title: You've been invited
invite.body: {inviter} invited you to join {studio} as {role, select, maintainer {a Maintainer} guest {a Guest} other {a Guest}}.
invite.invalidTitle: This invitation is no longer valid
invite.invalidBody: The link may have expired or already been used. Ask the studio admin to send a new invite.
invite.expiredBody: Your invite to {studio} is past its 7-day window. Ask the studio admin to send a new one.
invite.notInviteeTitle: This invitation isn't for this account
invite.notInviteeBody: You're signed in as a different user. Sign in with the account this invite was sent to.
invite.declinedBody: You declined the invite to {studio}. You can ask the admin to invite you again later.
invite.actionFailed: Could not complete that. Please try again.

projectInvite.loadingBody: One moment while we load the invite.
projectInvite.title: You've been invited
projectInvite.body: {inviter} invited you to join {project} as {role, select, editor {an editor} viewer {a viewer} other {a member}}.
projectInvite.invalidTitle: This invitation is no longer valid
projectInvite.invalidBody: The link may have expired or already been used. Ask the Project owner to send a new invite.
projectInvite.expiredBody: Your invite to {project} is past its 7-day window. Ask the Project owner to send a new one.
projectInvite.notInviteeTitle: This invitation isn't for this account
projectInvite.notInviteeBody: You're signed in as a different user. Sign in with the account this invite was sent to.
projectInvite.declinedBody: You declined the invite to {project}. You can ask the owner to invite you again later.
projectInvite.actionFailed: Could not complete that. Please try again.

noAccess.title: You don't have access to this project
noAccess.description: Please contact the project owner to request access. They can invite you by email.
